issues.title: Customizable text/content property in Neo4jVectorStore

comments.body:
Hi.  Thanks for the feedback.

@meistermeier @michael-simons if you could please take a look, does this make sense to change as I'm not so familiar with neo4j to make this change myself.
i might do it over the weekend since i already have the implementation. that would be my first open source pr, do I just link it here?

Sorry for the delay in my answer. I see no problem by adding a little bit more configuration options.
If you still default to `text` like the other configurable properties, this should be a nice addition.
@meistermeier or @michael-simons Would you be able to submit a PR to address this issue?
If @Temuu-jin does not want to, I am can do it. Otherwise I am also happy to review the PR.
I will get going today and will add you as reviewer, thank you for the reminder!
